metadata.purpose: Reconstruct direct and aggregate counterparties from existing RXRP full investigation artifacts without making relationship verdicts.
claim_policy: Direct Helius and Arkham rows are observations, not final relationship verdicts.
Nansen rows are aggregate triage only and are not transaction-level evidence.
Unresolved direct counterparties require wallet/token-account/program/pool/router classification before monitor promotion.
Do not infer not_related or no_infrastructure from this artifact.

summary.next_step: Resolve unresolved direct counterparties as wallet/token-account/program/pool/router, check network-map overlap, then run bounded live checks only on unresolved wallet-like counterparties.
